nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, ‘This city will certainly be given into the hand of the army of the king of Babylon and he will capture it.’ ”

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: This city shall surely be given into the hand of the army of the king of Babylon and be taken.”

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說：‘這城必交在巴比倫王軍隊的手中，巴比倫王必攻取這城。’”

ccb.text: 耶和华说，‘这城必落在巴比伦王的军队手中，他们必攻占这城。’”
